sutta: [Music] the buddha mounts taking life when pursued practiced increased brings 1 to hell to an animal's womb to the ghost realm what is the very trifling result of taking life is the shortening of a man's life monks stealing when pursued brings 1 to hell to an animal's womb to the ghost realm the very trifling result is man's loss of wealth monks fleshly lusts when pursued brings 1 to hell to an animal's womb to the ghost realm the very trifling result is a man's rivalry and hatred monks lying when pursued brings 1 to hell to an animal's womb to the ghost realm the very trifling result is the slandering and false speaking of a man monks malicious tale bearing when pursuit brings 1 to hell to an animal's womb to the ghost realm the very tribling result is the breaking up of a man's friendship monk's harsh speech when pursued brings 1 to hell to an animal's womb to the ghost realm the very trifling result is an unpleasing noise for a man monks idle talk when pursued brings 1 to hell to an animal's womb to the ghost realm the very trifling result is unacceptable speech for a man monks drinking strong drink when pursued practice increased brings 1 to hell to an animal's womb to the ghost realm what is a very trifling result of drinking strong drink is madness for a man that's the end of the sutta
commentary: here normally concerning the precepts we hear about the 5 precepts but we notice in the sutasa that sometimes the buddha mentions 7 precepts and in this uttar please mention the 7 precepts plus the liquor precept which makes it the 8 precepts and it seems from the sutasa that originally the buddha made 7 precepts the first 1 is to abstain from killing second to abstain from taking what is not given the third is abstain from adultery the fourth is to abstain from lying [Music] and [Music] another 3 are also connected with verbal karma the fifth is abstention from malicious steel bearing that means not to when you hear a talking bad about b you don't repeat to be what a said to make them moral and fighting that is abstention from malicious tear bearing and sixth 1 is harsh speech abstention from heart speech the seventh is abstention from idol tom and these were the original 7 precepts and and they uh if you look at the iron eightfold path and they are found there and the fifth precept the the the precept against ring was added later and it is also not found in the ariana eightfold path so you notice in these 8 precepts uh if you break these a precepts constantly and then we'll be reborn into the ghost realm but even if we don't make a habit of breaking these 8 precepts these precepts if we uh if we do break them the first 1 the result of killing taking life the trifling result is the shortening of a man's life you'll have short life because you make other beings life short the second 1 stealing the trifling result of stealing now is a man's loss of wealth that means you will also your wealth will also be stolen and then adultery trifling result of adultery results in rivalry and hatred in the next life and lying and the result of lying the trifling result of lying is slandering and false speaking of that person in return and then malicious tale bearing the result is breaking up of a man's friendship because you break up other person's friendships so you will also suffer the same result then harsh feature the result noise idle talk the result is unacceptable speech in the future and taking liquor and intoxicants and the trifling result of that now is madness in the future life so because of that now we have to be careful to keep these precepts purely the nexuta is
